sections_cited: Section 100C of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI I. T. R. A. No. 186 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on CMA No. 1245/2025. 2) For orders on office objection No. 11. 3) For orders on CMA No. 1238/2025. 4) For orders on CMA No. 1239/2025. 5) For hearing of main case. 20.05.2025. Mr. Anwar Kashif Mumtaz, Advocate for Applicant. ______________ 1) Granted. 2) To be satisfied before the next date. 3) Granted subject to all exceptions. 4 & 5) At the very outset, learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the controversy as raised in this matter in respect of required approval from the Chief Commissioner Inland Revenue to be eligible for claiming tax credit under Section 100C of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 is already pending before this Court in number of cases including ITRA No. 523 of 2024, wherein, ad-interim order has been passed on 18.11.2024. He prays for the similar treatment as already granted by this Court in like cases. Let notice to the Respondents on the proposed Questions for 19.08.2025. Till then no coercive measures be adopted against the Applicant for the recovery of the amount. To come up along with ITRA No. 523 of 2024 and other connected matters on the next date. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
